ground_truth.title: Low-Cost/Sliding-Scale or No-Cost Mental Health Providers
ground_truth.main_content:
Please note that USF offers this list as an informational resource. Inclusion does not constitute endorsement of the listed treatment providers or facilities. Availability of services cannot be guaranteed by USF. It is the responsibility of the student to contact providers to make appointments. Users assume responsibility for evaluating and selecting among the providers included in these listings.

Insurance may not be accepted for low/no-cost and sliding-scale services. Generally, low/no-cost and sliding-scale fees are based on client income/ability to pay. Fees noted (as available) on this list are subject to change and should be confirmed with the provider. Any cost/payment is to be determined between the provider and individual seeking services.

Access Institute for Psychological Services
110 Gough St. Suite 301
(415) 861-5449
Psychotherapy & Medication
Fees based on income

Center for Somatic Psychotherapy
Affiliated with the CA Institute of Integral Studies
220 Montgomery St. Suite 600
(415) 217-8895
Psychotherapy
Scale: $35-110 per session

Christian Counseling Centers
801 Portola Dr. Suite 108
(415) 674-7504
Psychotherapy

CA Institute of Integral Studies (CIIS) Psychological Services Center
507 Polk St, Suite 420
(415) 346-1011
Psychotherapy & Psychological testing
Fees based on income

California Pacific Medical Center Counseling Clinic
(415) 600-3247
Psychotherapy and Psychiatry
Low fee

Dimensions Health Clinic
3850 17th Street
(415) 934-7757
LGBTQIA focus
Psychotherapy for queer, trans, and questioning persons ages 12 to 25; weekly support group for transgender & gender-variant persons.
Mental health services are FREE

Free HELP—San Francisco: Download charts listing resources for free mental health assistance, food, shelter, medical aid, and help with neighborhood problems in San Francisco

Golden Gate Integral Counseling Center (CA Institute of Integral Studies)
507 Polk Street, Suite 450
415-561-0230
Psychotherapy
Fees based on income

Greenlight Clinic
336 Bon Air Center
Suite 5112
Greenbrae, California 94904
(415) 742-4306
hello@greenlightclinic.org
Psychotherapy
Free services (individual and group) for ages 14 to 26

Holos Institute
Inner Richmond District
(415) 862-0594
Psychotherapy
Fees based on income

Hyde Street Community Services/Tenderloin Outpatient Clinic
815 Hyde Street, 1st Floor
San Francisco, CA 94109
(415) 673-5700, info@hydestreetcs.org
Medication services, case management for low-income, underserved, and homeless San Francisco residents; mental health assessment and therapy through Tenderloin clinic
Services are free for SF residents with low financial resources

Integral Counseling Center (CA Institute of Integral Studies)
2140 Pierce Street
(415) 776-3109
Psychotherapy
Fees based in income

Marina Counseling Center
2137 Lombard St.@ Fillmore
(415) 563-2137
Psychotherapy
Fees based in income

New Perspectives Center for Counseling
5026 Geary Blvd.
(415) 752-5275
Psychotherapy
Fees based on income

Open Path
Multiple SF locations (network of private therapists)
(800) 268-2833
Psychotherapy
For uninsured or underinsured clients who can't afford full therapy fees
Scale: $30–60 per individual session (up to $80 for couples therapy), plus a one-time $59 lifetime membership fee

Queer LifeSpace
2275 Market Street
(415) 358-2000
Psychotherapy—LGBTQIA focus
Scale: $30 and up for individuals, $50 and up for couples, $15 and up for groups, based on income

SF Therapy Collective
2275 Market Street Suite E
(415) 659-8282
Psychotherapy, Psychiatry, Groups—LGBTQIA focus
Scale: Psychotherapy— $80 and up for individuals and $100 and up for couples; Psychiatry: Initial—$350 and up, follow-up—$150 and up

The San Francisco Marriage and Couples Center
Multiple SF locations
(415) 494-7074
Fees based on income

Well Clinic
383 Rhode Island St., Suite 201
100 Bush St., Suite #508
(415) 952-0290 (both locations)
Psychotherapy, Psychiatry
Fees based on income

This list is not exhaustive other local providers may also be listed on our Search for Providers webpage.
